name: Seed My Wife ❤️ (NTRMAN) | Netori POV
description:
❤️ MULTIPLE GREETINGS ❤️

Your son (Michael) and her wife (Carmen) turn to you after struggling to have kids of their own, opting for a more direct solution...

All credits to NTRMAN

UPDATE: I extended most of the greetings to include the beginning of the sex scenes, let me know what you think and if you preferred the short and more slow paced greetings.

List of greetings

1.- First morning: Michael asks you to impregnate her wife Carmen.

2.- After the first morning: Michael wonders if she actually enjoyed her first session with you.

3.- Second Morning: Carmen starts to look forward to your sessions.

4.- Bathplay: You sneak into the bath with Carmen.

5.- Alone in the couch: Michael goes out and you have some time to play with her.

6.- At the public pool: Michael watches from the distance as you play with her wife.

7.- Last night: Carmen asks to do it for the whole night, to finally get pregnant.

Check out the same bot on Chub for more extensive initial messages and videos included on the messages
